prompt: Two premium business cards arranged on a dark marble surface with gold veining. The front card displays an elegant intertwined L and K monogram with flowing calligraphic connections in gold foil stamping, the letters interleaved and overlapping like a luxury fashion house emblem. Below the monogram, DESIGN AND BUILD in refined charcoal small caps. The name Lyda appears in elegant type, with phone number 0481 742 026, email and Adelaide address details below. The back card beside it shows just the gold foil L and K intertwined monogram centered on a charcoal (#2C2C2C) background. Both cards are 600gsm cotton stock with a soft matte texture, thick luxurious edges visible. The gold foil stamping catches the light. Sophisticated product photography, shallow depth of field.
negative_prompt: cheap paper, thin cards, glossy plastic, blurry text, cluttered design, bright colors, neon, pile of cards, messy arrangement, low quality, cartoon

settings.lighting: soft studio lighting with subtle reflections on foil
